title: Puppet Retell
description: A spoken retell game where kids correct mixed-up puppet versions of familiar tales.
learningGoals: Recall key moments from familiar stories
Build confidence retelling with toys or puppets
interactionModel: choose-one tap the picture that fixes a puppet's incorrect story retell
feedbackModel: Correct fixes sparkle and invite retelling; misses wiggle gently, get a spoken puppet-mix-up nudge, and replay the prompt.

modes.title: Whose Line?
modes.skill: matching famous story lines to characters

credits: Emoji placeholder puppet and story art plus one shared pig card. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
